Wednesday 22nd March 2021

Today I'm going to take it easy on myself. I'm feeling super stressed which is not good. This morning I'm gonna just  chill out in bed, have my coffee, then head to Mile End at 8.30am. I'll do what work I can throughout the day but I might just sack it all off. I need to feel calm. In control. Right now my head is fuzzy and I feel kinda mad about everything. Let's get happy! There's nothing that can't wait until tomorrow :)
